summary: Iteration 6 retest of Mr. Maybe Flight (Expo web preview, 390x844). Verified 8/9 fixes. Static code grep confirms (a) ALL pointerEvents in app code use style.pointerEvents (no prop usage), (b) NO shadow*/textShadow* anywhere in app/ or src/, (c) useMemo(()=>new Animated.Value(0),[]) pattern in index.tsx (bobAnim, shimmer), skins.tsx (shimmer), and game.tsx (shimmerAnim) — no useRef(new Animated.Value()).current, (d) home Animated.timing useNativeDriver is Platform-aware (`useNative = Platform.OS !== 'web'`) on bobAnim, shimmer keeps false on web, (e) game.tsx Ready overlay renders teal tip card 'Tip: tap Calibrate first while holding the phone in your natural pose.' (verified visually), (f) game.tsx calibration overlay JSX has 'HOLD STEADY' + countdown + 'Hold the phone in your natural play pose' + 'This becomes your new neutral' (verified at JSX level — couldn't trigger overlay on web because DeviceMotion sensors don't exist; doCalibrate likely no-ops), (g) /skins still renders 4 free + 3 premium grid with EQUIPPED/lock chips, (h) /game renders Ready overlay with FLY + Calibrate + Back buttons, HUD (score 0, compass, SPEED bar). Runtime captured 0 pageerrors, 0 console errors, 0 useNativeDriver warnings, 0 shadow warnings. ONE issue confirmed: Settings CALIBRATION card does NOT actually render the 4 numbered steps + Tip line — only renders 'Pitch/Roll' values + Recalibrate Now button (screenshot confirmed). The supporting StyleSheet entries (calibSteps, calibStep, calibStepNum, calibStrong, calibTip) exist in settings.tsx lines 217–247 but the JSX <View> with the steps was never added inside the CALIBRATION card (settings.tsx lines 81–97). Also one residual 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' warning still fires on initial app mount — this comes from `@react-navigation/elements` (Expo Router internal Stack/Screen views), NOT from user code; not fixable in app source.

ui_bugs.issue: Step-by-step instructions (numbered 1-4 + Tip line) are MISSING in JSX. Styles calibSteps/calibStep/calibStepNum/calibStrong/calibTip are defined but never used. The CALIBRATION card (lines 81-97) only shows Pitch/Roll values and 'Recalibrate Now' button. Iteration 6 fix #3 was not actually wired into JSX — only styles were added.

react_native_issues.issue: One residual 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' warning still fires on initial mount. Source is library-internal (node_modules/expo-router/node_modules/@react-navigation/elements/src/Header/* and Screen.tsx, ResourceSavingView.tsx). NOT fixable from app code; safe to ignore until expo-router upgrade. App code itself is clean.

action_items:
ADD numbered step-by-step calibration instructions to Settings CALIBRATION card. The styles already exist in settings.tsx (calibSteps/calibStep/calibStepNum/calibStrong/calibTip). Insert this JSX inside the CALIBRATION <View style={styles.card}> right after the Recalibrate Now <TouchableOpacity> (after line 96) — example:

  <View style={styles.calibSteps} testID="calibration-instructions">
    <Text style={styles.calibStep}><Text style={styles.calibStepNum}>1.</Text> Hold your phone the way you naturally would while playing.</Text>
    <Text style={styles.calibStep}><Text style={styles.calibStepNum}>2.</Text> Tap <Text style={styles.calibStrong}>Recalibrate Now</Text>.</Text>
    <Text style={styles.calibStep}><Text style={styles.calibStepNum}>3.</Text> Stay still during the 3-2-1 countdown.</Text>
    <Text style={styles.calibStep}><Text style={styles.calibStepNum}>4.</Text> That pose becomes your new neutral. Tilt left/right/forward/back from there.</Text>
    <Text style={styles.calibTip}>Tip: recalibrate any time the plane drifts on its own.</Text>
  </View>

After fix, re-test only Settings → CALIBRATION card visibility.
critical_code_review_comments: settings.tsx: dead StyleSheet entries (calibSteps, calibStep, calibStepNum, calibStrong, calibTip) — defined but never referenced. Either wire them up (per action_items above) or remove.

game.tsx remains very large (1289 lines). Iteration 5 review already flagged this; still applicable. Splitting Ready overlay, Pause overlay, and Game-Over reward block into separate components would help.
seed_data_creation: None — used fresh localStorage. Default progress (LVL 1, 0 XP, Origami equipped) shown on home, which matches expected initial state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested via Playwright at https://flying-game-demo-1.preview.emergentagent.com on 390x844 viewport. The single failing item is settings.tsx CALIBRATION step-by-step instructions — main agent must add the missing <View style={styles.calibSteps}> block inside settings.tsx CALIBRATION card (insert after line 96). All other iteration-6 deliverables verified clean: useMemo pattern, platform-aware useNativeDriver, Ready overlay tip card, calibration overlay hint text in JSX, /skins grid, no console errors, no pageerrors, no shadow warnings, no useNativeDriver warnings. The residual 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' warning is from @react-navigation/elements inside expo-router and cannot be silenced from app code. To trigger the calibration overlay on web for visual verification, you'd need to mock DeviceMotion or test on a real device — calibration text was therefore verified at JSX level (game.tsx lines 738-751) only.
rca_of_issue: Reproduction: navigate to /settings on mobile viewport — CALIBRATION card shows only 'Pitch: 0.000 · Roll: 0.000' and the Recalibrate Now button. RCA: in iteration 6, main agent added the StyleSheet entries (calibSteps, calibStep, calibStepNum, calibStrong, calibTip in settings.tsx lines 217-247) but never added the corresponding <View>/<Text> JSX inside the CALIBRATION card body. Fix: insert the <View style={styles.calibSteps}> block (template provided in action_items) between the existing TouchableOpacity testID='recalibrate-button' (closing tag at line 96) and the closing </View> of the CALIBRATION card (line 97).
